message:
feat: track pending evaluations after mutations in LearnProcess

After each applyMutation, records a PendingEvaluation with agent name,
mutation type, timestamp, commit hash, and description. Persists to
{genomePath}/metrics/pending-evaluations.json. Adds Genome.lastCommitHash()
method to capture the commit SHA of each mutation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
